---
title: "LaborMarketAndOrigin_Henry_Reynaud"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
date: "2026-05-10"
---

# Linear time series 2 : Applied Project: Gross industrial production index (2021) - Pharmaceutical industry

```{r load-data}
data_raw <- read.csv("valeurs_mensuelles.csv", 
                     sep = ";",
                     header = TRUE,
                     stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

head(data_raw)
```
```{r load-and-plot}
# Chargement en sautant les 4 lignes d'en-tête INSEE
data_raw <- read.csv("valeurs_mensuelles.csv",
                     sep = ";", header = FALSE, skip = 4,
                     stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Renommer les colonnes
colnames(data_raw) <- c("date", "ipi", "code")

# Convertir les colonnes
data_raw$date <- as.Date(paste0(data_raw$date, "-01"))  # "2026-02" -> "2026-02-01"
data_raw$ipi  <- as.numeric(data_raw$ipi)

# Trier par ordre chronologique
data_raw <- data_raw[order(data_raw$date), ]

# Graphique
plot(data_raw$date, data_raw$ipi,
     type = "l", col = "steelblue", lwd = 1.5,
     main = "IPI - Industrie pharmaceutique (base 100 en 2021)",
     xlab = "Date", ylab = "Indice brut")
```
